_meta.description: Group visit information, rates, and booking details - staff can update pricing and policies
_meta.staffInstructions: This file controls group visit information. Update prices annually. Update policies as needed.

fieldGuide.rates.price: Price per person in whole DOLLARS
fieldGuide.rates.minSize: Minimum group size for this rate
fieldGuide.types.name: Name of the group type
fieldGuide.policies: Array of policy statements shown to visitors

rules: Group prices are in DOLLARS (not cents)
Keep rates in order from smallest to largest group size
All rates should have clear eligibility criteria

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing this file
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify changes with user before committing
prohibited: Do NOT make changes without user awareness
Do NOT change group rates without approval

rates.label: Student Groups
rates.notes: One free adult chaperone per 10 students

rates.label: Driver/Escort
rates.eligibility: Motor coach driver and tour escort

types.name: Motor Coach Tours
types.description: Professional tour groups traveling through East Tennessee. We accommodate bus parking and can customize tour length.

types.name: Family Reunions
types.description: Multi-generational gatherings discovering shared heritage. Private tours available for larger groups.

types.name: Scout Troops
types.description: Boy Scouts, Girl Scouts, and other youth organizations. Badge-related activities available.

types.name: Church Groups
types.description: Sunday school classes, youth groups, and adult fellowship trips exploring faith and history.

types.name: Senior Organizations
types.description: Retirement communities, senior centers, and AARP chapters. Accessible tour options available.

types.name: Historical Societies
types.description: DAR, SAR, genealogy groups, and local historical societies. Extended research visits possible.

whatToKnow.title: Advance Booking
whatToKnow.text: Groups should book 2-4 weeks in advance. Larger groups (25+) should contact us at least one month ahead.

whatToKnow.title: Dress Code
whatToKnow.text: Comfortable walking shoes recommended. The site includes outdoor walking on uneven terrain.

whatToKnow.title: Accessibility
whatToKnow.text: The museum gallery is fully ADA accessible. Historic buildings have some stairs. Contact us to discuss specific needs.

whatToKnow.title: Parking
whatToKnow.text: Free parking including motor coach parking. Pull-through spaces available for buses.

whatToKnow.title: Food & Picnic
whatToKnow.text: Picnic area available for groups bringing lunch. No food service on site. Restaurants nearby in Piney Flats.

whatToKnow.title: Weather Policy
whatToKnow.text: Tours run rain or shine. In severe weather, we offer modified indoor experiences or rescheduling.

addOns.name: Private Tour
addOns.description: Exclusive tour for your group only

testimonials._note: These are placeholders - actual testimonials should be in testimonials.json with usedOn: ['groups']
